Compliance.description: PSIRA accredited training center, requires PSIRA for staff, B-BBEE Level 1, no negative regulatory issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3/5 from 5 recent 1-star reviews on service failures; employee Indeed 4/5; limited customer Google data.

Product Value.description: Standard industry pricing for comprehensive armed response, guarding, tech; good range but value questioned by poor service reviews.

Innovation.description: Technology solutions, integrated tech+manpower, CCTV on vehicles, cloud VMS app (possibly related), learnerships.

Customer Support.description: Reviews highlight poor on-site support, unresponsive guards, admin delays in payouts/placements.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website accessible, tech solutions mentioned but no specific POPIA mention or app for customers; assumes standard security practices.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: R400-R1000/mo typical for Gauteng armed response (industry avg 2025)

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter poor (3/5, all recent negative); Indeed employee positive (4/5); limited other social/customer data.
